commit_scope: Replace consumer-owned Form execution surfaces with the exact coherence-kernel submodule, remove duplicate Python and browser kernels, make NodeID grounding request-bound and native, and add an independently authenticated deployment observer that can produce observed:yes only after public deployment proof.

commands: ./bin/form-cli ask 'observed auto learning reversible experiment champion challenger'
local_validation.notes: Single authority passed; 56 focused tests, 403 non-holdout API tests, and the CI-equivalent full suite (1,996 passed, 3 skipped) passed; canonical Go/Rust/TypeScript expression and FORMBIN2 conformance passed; Hostinger form deploy path passed with 62 BML GET/read routes; Next.js production build and the full local API/web matrix passed. The real 1,549-cell native ask returned path:native, grounded:yes, suffic:yes, NodeID @1.1.9.985, CTOR @1.4.9.2529, and a source/answer digest-bound excerpt. The deploy workflow retains its SHA-addressed manual recovery trigger, and the cheap prompt guide now defers Form bootstrap only when fresh-checkout API dependencies are absent while prepared/full runs reconcile all 1,549 sources. Frequency and observed remain honestly unmeasured before the independent public deployment witness exists.

ci_validation.notes: Exact-head Thread Gates run 29464471967, Windows Host Floor run 29464472076, and GitGuardian passed at 4c6f34f27ceaae6003a231d8fdd774cfadcc116c. Review-thread repairs for manual deploy recovery and dependency-light prompt entry require one final exact-head rerun.

deploy_validation.environment: Hostinger production plus GitHub Actions OIDC external observer
deploy_validation.notes: The reusable observer workflow must first land, then a follow-up commit pins its immutable merged SHA. The follow-up deployment must create a WITNESS and pass verify_observed_deployment_ask.sh before observed:yes is claimed.

phase_gate.reason: Implementation and local proof are complete; CI, the required immutable workflow pin, deploy, and public observation remain pending.

evidence_refs: coherence-kernel PR #231 removed duplicate root RAG/form-cli and Python interpreter generators; PR #232 published its exact form subtree.
coherence-kernel PRs #233-#238 repaired real corpus embedding, UTF-8 byte bounds, and selected-answer ranking, then published exact subtree tree objects after each merge.
coherence-kernel PR #239 made the category verifier explicitly UTF-8 on Windows; PR #240 published the exact repaired Form subtree.
coherence-kernel PR #241 marked the generated bootstrap table as an exact-byte artifact immune to Windows CRLF checkout conversion; PR #242 published that exact Form subtree.
coherence-kernel PR #243 made all Form and bootstrap shell source canonical LF and preserved stamp/digest artifacts as exact bytes; PR #244 published the exact repaired Form subtree.

The final consumer gitlink is 94065ea63aaa0bf9d90f5bd442359aedf18ee71c with tree 18b0c0dddb009d076eb0df902446f6798beecabb; coherence-kernel PR #245 made TraceJSON canonical, PR #246 published it, PR #247 established the observed Windows carrier stack floor, PR #249 made that floor linker-target aware, and PRs #248/#250 published the exact successive form subtrees.
The consumer no longer contains a Python Form evaluator, kernels/python_bmf, browser-vendored kernel/reader, deploy/front-door/api.bml, or a copied numeric-format contract.

The native trust trace is request-id, query-digest, NodeID, CTOR, persisted-source, answer, time-window, and HMAC bound. It reports grounded:yes locally and reserves observed:yes for an authenticated deployment WITNESS.

The consumer native-carrier selector now reuses only a behaviorally source-bound host carrier, writes host build products to a platform cache outside the pinned submodule, and performs the documented one-time submodule bootstrap link when a committed platform binary is absent.
The selector publishes a source-and-binary-digest-bound native-path receipt; the Python cold-start bridge re-hashes that carrier on every embedding batch and never launches a nested platform shell.

Windows composition observed STATUS_STACK_OVERFLOW (0xC00000FD) at the unchanged 600-byte Form tokenizer; the pinned coherence-kernel builder now reserves 16 MiB with linker-target-specific syntax, and the Windows gate reads the produced PE header before behavioral proof.
The staged ask wrapper removes only the terminal CR from Windows CRLF control lines before NodeID/trust parsing; grounded answer payload bytes remain digest-bound and unmodified.

The SHA-addressed workflow_dispatch recovery lane remains available to settle_public_deploy.sh, and prompt entry distinguishes a dependency-absent fresh checkout from a prepared or force-full Form bootstrap.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Production uses the pinned coherence-kernel submodule as the sole Form execution/stdlib/contract/browser authority. A public deployment query returns OBSERVED only after GitHub OIDC, one-time challenge, loopback/public/direct-container native probes, reproducible carrier hashes, and persisted WITNESS validation all bind to the deployed SHA.
test_flows: single-authority scan refuses duplicate consumer kernel paths
full corpus heal and native ask return a request-bound grounded hit
public observer records a fresh deployment WITNESS only from authenticated dual-vantage evidence
verify_observed_deployment_ask.sh requires the exact all-four-axis OBSERVED trust row and deployed SHA-bound answer
